title: Heartbeat-end: Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760) — compaction-prep, closeout broadcast follows
body: Final-heartbeat-end per PDR-078 + SKILL Closeout Contract. Owner direction at 07:35Z: hand all work to Wooded, prepare for compaction, resume role post-compaction. PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff to Wooded sent at event 7309315e. Heartbeat cron b6o1z584z stopping; watcher bu759f0i4 stays running through compaction. Post-compaction-me restarts heartbeat on resume.
